allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: initialize project structure with core configs *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: complete phase 3 - forecast service & alert system *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: complete phase 4 - model version management *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: add comprehensive project summary *)

PowerShell($body = '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; if\($response.code -eq 200\){"✅ 登录成功！"; "Token: " + $response.data.token.Substring\(0,50\) + "..."; "用户: " + $response.data.username}else{"状态码: " + $response.code; "消息: " + $response.message})
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: add BCryptPasswordEncoder bean to resolve container startup failure *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: correct MATLAB script path and attempt Zotero operations *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: complete MATLAB analysis and Zotero integration *)

PowerShell(Write-Output ""; Write-Output "[9/9] 测试API访问..."; Write-Output ""; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/forecast/models" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "✅ API访问成功！"; Write-Output "状态码: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "返回内容: $\($response.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "⚠️ API访问失败"; Write-Output "状态码: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; Write-Output "提示: 后端可能还在启动中，请稍等或查看日志" })
